chatbot.title: MESOB Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Free rule-based support
chatbot.welcome: Hello! I am MESOB eService assistant. Ask me about services, criteria, reports, how to apply, tracking, appointments, payments, or resubmission.
chatbot.error: Sorry, I could not answer right now. Please try again.
